# chalk_service_token (Resource)

Chalk service token resource

**Required permissions:** `tokens.write`, `tokens.list`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Service token name

### Optional

- `custom_claims` (Map of String) Custom claims for the service token (key-value pairs where values are comma-separated lists)
- `default_permission` (String) Default permission for features
- `feature_tag_to_permission` (Map of String) Map of feature tags to permissions
- `permissions` (List of String) List of permissions for the service token

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (String) Client ID for the service token
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) Client secret for the service token
- `id` (String) Service token identifier
